From: "Jay Lefkowitz" <JLefkowitz@kirkland.com>
Subject: Re: Zwirn
Date: Fri, 13 Jun 2008 20:11:52 GMT
To: "Darren" <DKIESQ@aol.com>

I think we have a colorable basis to file there.   I heard from shulte today.  They want to get together in next 10 days.   I said if they won't pay at that time, we would sue.  


----- Original Message -----
From: DKIESQ
Sent: 06/13/2008 03:42 PM EDT
To: Jay Lefkowitz
Subject: Zwirn



Have you had a chance to review the list of documents received in the USVI  
to determine whether there are grounds to file the suit in the USVI.   Jeffrey 
has asked me about it twice now.  Please let me know.   Thanks.
 
Darren K.  Indyke
